setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Enhanced test coverage with multiple scenarios including default, theory-based, null handling, exception testing, and edge case validation
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding more specific test scenarios based on actual implementation details
fileReports.note: Test class is currently a placeholder and requires actual implementation details

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, null input handling, and disposal scenarios
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding dependency injection for ProducerConfig and adding more robust error handling and logging
fileReports.note: Tests use localhost:9092 as bootstrap servers - adjust for actual Kafka configuration

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for Startup class covering configuration, service registration, middleware pipeline setup, and dependency injection scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more granular configuration binding tests
Add integration tests for actual service startup
Implement more detailed environment-specific configuration tests
fileReports.note: Tests require mock setup of IConfiguration and IWebHostEnvironment

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading scenarios, and disposal behavior
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding more detailed error logging and potentially exposing more granular error handling in the readMessage method
keyImprovements: Added null config/topic name validation tests
fileReports.note: Tests use mocking and rely on Confluent.Kafka configuration. Actual Kafka broker not required for these unit tests.

fileReports.summary: Created basic test coverage for Program.cs entry point with host creation and run verification
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding more detailed configuration and startup testing
fileReports.note: Test covers basic program startup scenario

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model with 8 test methods covering property initialization, enum validation, and edge cases
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes like [Required] or [Range] to enforce business rules
keyImprovements: Tested edge cases like negative quantities and null product names
fileReports.note: Tests assume no additional validation logic in the model

fileReports.summary: Added comprehensive test coverage for OrderController, testing valid and invalid scenarios, model state validation, serialization, and error handling
recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling
fileReports.note: Requires Confluent.Kafka package for ProducerConfig and ProducerWrapper

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProcessOrdersService with 4 test methods covering constructor, order processing, null handling, and multiple product scenarios
recommendations: Add more robust error handling in the service
Consider adding more specific exception handling
fileReports.note: Requires Confluent.Kafka package for full functionality
